mapper.sql: C.COMMENT_ID, C.PLAYLIST_ID, C.USER_ID, COALESCE(U.NICKNAME, '탈퇴한 사용자') AS USER_NICKNAME, C.CONTENT, C.CREATED_AT, C.UPDATED_AT, C.DELETED_AT
FROM COMMENTS C JOIN PLAYLISTS P ON P.PLAYLIST_ID = C.PLAYLIST_ID LEFT JOIN USERS U ON U.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND U.DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_COMMENTS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO COMMENTS ( COMMENT_ID, PLAYLIST_ID, USER_ID, CONTENT ) VALUES ( #{commentId}, #{playlistId}, #{userId}, #{content, jdbcType=CLOB} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE C.PLAYLIST_ID = #{playlistId} AND C.DELETED_AT IS NULL AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL ORDER BY C.CREATED_AT ASC, C.COMMENT_ID ASC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET CONTENT = #{content, jdbcType=CLOB}, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAYLISTS P WHERE P.PLAYLIST_ID = COMMENTS.PLAYLIST_ID AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL )
mapper.select: SELECT UPDATED_AT FROM COMMENTS WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE COMMENTS SET DELETED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP, UPDATED_AT = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE COMMENT_ID = #{commentId} AND USER_ID = #{userId} AND DELETED_AT IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM PLAYLISTS P WHERE P.PLAYLIST_ID = COMMENTS.PLAYLIST_ID AND P.DELETED_AT IS NULL )
